sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28453" key="droso/liqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δροσό-λιθος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a <sense id="n28453.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gem,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Etym.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.12.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
